description: Build, inspect, and flash STM32 microcontroller projects using STM32CubeIDE, STM32CubeMX generated projects, STM32CubeProgrammer CLI, OpenOCD, or CMake/Make where applicable. Use when Codex needs to compile, diagnose, or program STM32 firmware.
adapter_notes: Prefer stm32cubeidec or Eclipse CDT headless build for CubeIDE projects. Prefer STM32_Programmer_CLI for flash when available. Fall back to OpenOCD only when board/probe cfg is known.
